title: ぞくぞく！前だけは譲らないの

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, still feeling lost, I wander back to the track. A
scrimmage is in full swing, and it's livelier than usual.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! I can't believe C.B.'s really racing! They're almost at the final
corner, which means...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, here it comes... Her lightning dash to the front!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after the race ends, the crowd is teeming with
excitement—including one particularly enthusiastic Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That was... amazing! So, so, sooo AMAZING! Now I wanna run! I
wanna ruuuuun!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: C'mon, guys! What're you waiting for? Let's gooooo!

text_block_list.name: Runaway Besties
text_block_list.text: Waheeey!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Seein' that got me all hyped up! Get ready to eat my dust, Ines!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you're going DOWN!

text_block_list.name: Spectating Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, look at her go! They're doing 2,400 meters, right?! She's
getting faster and faster... Won't she run outta gas at this rate?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(200 meters to go! I can hear Palmer and Helios catching up! Three
meters behind? Two meters? No, they're even closer!)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: (My legs feel heavy, and my chest hurts... But I don't care!)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(I'll push my body to my limit, right here on the turf! I'll keep running
faster and faster—and further than anyone else!)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Heh... Heheheh!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff... Pheeeeew...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Heeey, you all good, Ines? You really put the pedal to the metal,
don't you!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Phew... Heheh, I'm fine, I'm fine! In fact, I couldn't be better!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Haha, I bet! You're totally giving off that vibe!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that Ines... She really does become a totally different person in
the heat of the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My heart pounds uncontrollably—the way she ripped through the turf
like a wild animal has me completely mesmerized.
choice_data_list: (A switch must flip in her when she runs...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not about to be outdone! All right, time to hit the gym and
pump some iron!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to take my eyes off Ines Fujin, I silently watch as she takes a
breather... until she notices me and walks over.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I remember you—from the other day with the phone, right? I had
a feeling you were a trainer here!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: You've been spying on me for a while now, right? Need something?
choice_data_list:
Oh, uh... I was just thinking that you must really
like racing.

Oh, uh... I was just thinking that you must really
like racing.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe, yep! I love it more than anything!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
When I run, my heart goes craaazy like thump-thump! I can't help but
wanna go faster and faster!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Then the moment I pull ahead, my whole body tingles—it feels
amazing! I can't get enough of it!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It's hard to explain... But if you were an Umamusume, you'd totally
know what I'm talking about. I'm sure of it.
choice_data_list: No, I get it... Just watching you race gets me excited too!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Haha, is that so? Oh, by the way, since you watched the scrimmage
earlier...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
How did I do? Personally, I think I could be even faster, so I'd love to
hear your feedback.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I recall Ines Fujin's races from the past two days. There's no
doubt—with her raw speed and relentless drive to stay ahead, she's
got the makings of a front runner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That said, not all front runners are the same. Some like to take control
and manipulate the pace, while others just continuously race ahead
without concern for the others.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In order to help her improve, I tell her that I'd need to see her run a lot more. That way, I can come up with a strategy that will work for her.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hmm, interesting... Gotcha.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: In that case... You can be my temporary trainer!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hear me out—this could be a solid opportunity for you! The thing is,
I'll be competing in the next Tracen Meet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Tracen Meet is a school event where runners choose their own
races to test and showcase their potential.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
My family will be there, and I really want to show them the fruits of
my hard work!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But since self-training has its limits, I've been thinking about turning
to the pros for help. And besides...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...You're not feeling super confident about being a trainer just yet,
right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I kinda overheard you at the restaurant... Anyway, if we work
together, it might just give you the confidence you need!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Which means this is a win-win deal for both of us! So that settles
it—let's start tomorrow! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how, in a surprising twist, I end up making a short-term
contract with Ines Fujin.
